## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFURL] object. For single files, the URL locates the file itself. For bundles, it locates the main executable as identified by the bundle’s `Info.plist` file.

This is generic information returned regardless of which [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/code-signing-information-flags] you pass to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopySigningInformation(_:_:_:)] function.

# kSecCodeInfoMainExecutable

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a URL locating the main executable file of the code.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCodeInfoMainExecutable: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFURL] object. For single files, the URL locates the file itself. For bundles, it locates the main executable as identified by the bundle’s `Info.plist` file.

This is generic information returned regardless of which [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/code-signing-information-flags] you pass to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopySigningInformation(_:_:_:)] function.
title: kSecCodeInfoMainExecutable
